hero_img_alt: Highway construction site by the Schnorpfeil Group
vp_1_desc: Road construction, earthworks, structural engineering, specialized civil engineering — we execute the infrastructure projects others decline. Interfaces between trades are not managed, they are eliminated.
vp_2_desc: Over 1,000 internal experts and a state-of-the-art machinery fleet — at Schnorpfeil, you don't depend on subcontractors. You lead your project.
vp_3_desc: Since 1948, we build the arteries of the economy. Our work is driven on, flown over, and relied upon — for decades to come.
hub_subtitle: Get to know the subsidiaries within our group and learn more about our broad range of services.
sub1_desc: A trusted partner for outstanding construction projects for over 75 years — from road and civil engineering to asphalt, concrete and structural bridge construction.
sub2_desc: Your partner for quality and safety on the road: concrete safety barriers, slipform construction, concrete surfaces and traffic safety — simple, fast and reliable.
sub3_desc: Pioneering large-scale projects in the Rhine-Main metropolitan region and beyond: airport construction, railway construction and energy infrastructure at the highest level.
sub4_desc: Naturally layered Moselle greywacke as building and design material, plus a complete range of building materials — from natural stone to road surfacing.
sub5_desc: No. 1 for safe construction: modular vehicle restraint systems in cast-in-place concrete — research, testing and development of barriers, transitions and system accessories.
sub6_desc: Soil landfill with integrated construction debris recycling — recovering recycled aggregates and sands for resource-efficient use in road construction.
sub7_desc: Your specialist for separation cuts, joint cutting, joint sealing and concrete rehabilitation — WHG-certified specialist company with state-of-the-art technology.
sub8_desc: Horizontal directional drilling and specialized civil engineering for trenchless pipe installation — precise, efficient and gentle on existing infrastructure.
sub9_desc: Supra-regional contractor for concrete safety barriers, RAL-certified steel protection systems, slipform construction and concrete pavements, based in the Ruhr area.
sub10_desc: Your partner for construction site transport and building material logistics — reliable, flexible and with a state-of-the-art fleet for on-time deliveries.
sub11_desc: Suction instead of digging: precise extraction where conventional methods reach their limits — efficient, high-performance and targeted in civil engineering.
meta_description: Schnorpfeil Group — road construction, structural engineering, earthworks and building material logistics from a single source. Family-run since 1948 with over 1,000 employees in Treis-Karden, Germany.
og_title: Schnorpfeil Group — All from One Source
